headline: Frontier Bird 💥 SMITES Fence-Jumping Runway Simp 😵🛫
text:
Frontier Airlines 🛫🐮 plane straight-up YEETS 🚀💀 a FENCE-FLIPPING TRESPASSER 😤🏃‍♂️ who YEETED himself over the perimeter like a budget Indiana Jones 🪂❌ at Denver DIA 🌨️✈️! Pilot drops the MIC 🎤💥 on ATC: 'We just HIT SOMEBODY 😱👤... ENGINE FIRE BLAZING 🔥🛩️!' Airbus A321 goin' BRRRR at 150-180 MPH 🏎️💨 – THWACK! 💥🩸 Trespasser pancaked 🥞😵 two mins after hoppin' that fence like he's auditionin' for GTA Airport Chaos 🎮🚫, scalin' it DELIBERATELY per TSA Sec Sean Duffy's spicy take 🔥📢: 'NO ONE SIMPS on airports EVER ‼️🚫🏰!'

Smoke FILLIN' the cabin like a bad vape sesh ☁️🚬💨 – passenger Jose Cervantes spillin' tea ☕😱 to CBS: 'Heard a THUD 💥, right wing EXPLODING 🔥🍆, thought I was BBQ'd to death 😩🔥!' Denver FD SLAYED the flames 🧑‍🚒💦 quick AF, then 224 souls 👻✈️ +7 crew bailed via INFLATABLE SLIDES 🛝🍑 – precautionary slide party! 🎉🪂 12 peeps with minor ouchies 😣🩹, 5 Uber'd to hospitals 🏥🚑, conditions TBA 🤷‍♂️.

Pilot to tower post-SPLAT: 'STOPPIN' on runway 🛑, individual WALKIN' across like he owns it 😤🚶‍♂️... 231 SOULS on board, high-speed SMACKDOWN! 💥🩸' Fence intact AF per DIA 🛡️✅ – not an employee, just some rando Darwin Award winner 🏆💀 playin' Frogger on the tarmac 🐸✈️. Runway SHUT 🔒 while FAA & NTSB sniff around like CSI detectives 🔍🕵️‍♂️. Frontier MOMMY 😢💔 'deeply saddened,' DIA echoin' sympathies 🙏😔. Passengers bused back 🚌🏛️, most yeeted to LA on replacement bird 🛫🌴 – no gate lice vibes today! Frontier: 'We feelin' this HARD 😭💦.' Trespasser? PERMA-GROUNDED 😵‍💫🪦 – don't be that guy, bros! 🚫🏃‍♂️✈️
